description: Legal record (#52). Disposition of inheritance. Belongs with the previous record. Headed "the text of what should be written," but this is not solely a template for another document, because it has witness siagnatures. The same situation as in #51 is explained in more detail, and there is a list of the items of the mother's dowry that were handed over by the trustee Bū Saʿd to the daughter's agent Avraham. Witnesses: Ḥiyya b. Yiṣḥaq; Efrayim b. Meshullam.
description_he: פנקס משפטי; חלוקת ירושה; ממשיך את הרשומה הקודמת; 'נוסח מה שצריך לכתוב'; רשימת הפריטים שמסר הנאמן בו סעד לשלוח הבת אברהם; עדים: חיא בן יצחק, אפרים בן משולם
